title: CRM Sync Without Copy-Paste for E-Commerce
metaDescription: Keep your e-commerce CRM in sync with your store, inbox, and billing. Live data, no manual entry, installed for you by Ayothedoc in about 10 business days.
excerpt: For online retailers, your CRM should reflect what just happened in the store, inbox, and billing. We install the Connections layer so live data flows in without copy-paste.

sections.intro:
If you run an online store, your customer record lives in too many places at once. The order is in the store, the support thread is in the inbox, the refund is in the billing tool, and the CRM is whatever you last typed into it at 11pm. By the time you want to follow up with a repeat buyer or rescue an abandoned cart, the data is stale and you are guessing.

The Ayothedoc AI Operating System fixes the plumbing first. We install the Connections layer so your CRM reflects what actually happened in the store, the inbox, the calendar, and the billing tool, in near real time. No spreadsheets, no overnight exports, no copy-paste from order confirmations. Your team works from one live customer view, and the rest of the AIOS works from that same source of truth.
sections.fourCFit:
This page is a Connections capability. It sits inside the wider AIOS:

  • Context: we encode your product catalog, customer segments, and brand voice so the CRM tags and notes match how you actually sell.
  • Connections (this page): the store, inbox, calendar, CRM, and billing tool share live data, two-way where it makes sense, one-way where that is safer.
  • Capabilities: drafts, follow-ups, refund summaries, repeat-buyer outreach, and abandoned-cart nudges all run off the synced record.
  • Cadence: syncs and reconciliations run on a schedule so problems are caught the same day, not at month end.
sections.whatDoneLooksLike:
When this capability is installed, here is the artifact you get and the SLA we hold it to:

  • A single customer record in your CRM that includes lifetime orders, last order date, average order value, open support threads, refund history, and current subscription or repeat-buyer status.
  • New orders appear in the CRM within 5 minutes of checkout, tagged by product, channel, and first-time vs returning.
  • Inbox conversations are linked to the matching customer record automatically, with the last 3 messages summarized in plain English.
  • Refunds, cancellations, and failed payments update the record within 15 minutes and trigger the right internal note, not a panicked email.
  • A weekly reconciliation report flags any record where the store, CRM, and billing disagree, with the suggested fix.
  • Zero manual copy-paste between the store, the inbox, the CRM, and the billing tool for routine customer events.
sections.howWeInstall:
We install in three phases. You stay in control the whole way.

  1. Audit (free, about 10 minutes): we map your current stack, where customer data lives, and where the copy-paste happens today. You get a short written plan even if you never hire us. Run the audit.
  2. Install (about 10 business days): we connect your store, inbox, calendar, CRM, and billing tool, define the field mapping, set the sync rules, and run the first reconciliation. You approve the rules before anything writes back to your CRM.
  3. Operate (ongoing): we monitor the syncs, fix breakages quickly, and add one new automation per week on top of the clean data, things like repeat-buyer outreach or VIP tagging. See plans.
sections.expectedResults:
Real ranges, based on what we see with online retailers after the Connections layer is in:

  • 8 to 15 hours a week recovered across the owner, customer service, and ops, mostly from killing manual data entry and end-of-day reconciliations.
  • Customer response times drop because support sees the full order and refund history without switching tabs.
  • Repeat purchase rate typically lifts 5 to 12 percent within 90 days once segments and follow-ups run on live data.
  • Refund and chargeback disputes get resolved faster because the record is already complete.
  • Our standing guarantee applies: we help you recover 40 or more hours a month across the AIOS, or we keep working free until you do.
sections.faq:
Do we have to switch CRMs or replace our store?

No. We are tool-agnostic and work with what you already use. The point of the Connections layer is to make your current stack behave like one system, not to make you migrate.

What happens if a sync breaks or an API changes?

We monitor the syncs as part of Operate. If something breaks, we are the ones who notice and fix it, usually before you do. The reconciliation report also catches silent drift.

Will the AI write back to our CRM without us seeing it?

Only inside rules you approve during Install. We default to the least AI necessary. Routine, low-risk updates (order tags, last order date) sync automatically. Anything customer-facing is drafted for review until you decide otherwise.
